name: Client Demo - Welcome
subject: Welcome to the platform, {{firstName}} 👋
html_body:
✦ ENCRYPTED END-TO-END

Hi {{firstName}},

You're in. This message was composed, encrypted, and dispatched through a zero-trust email platform - your data never touched a shared server in plaintext.

Every send is logged, every open tracked, and your unsubscribe link is cryptographically signed.

Get started ->

{{companyName}} · Sent securely via MailChad

Unsubscribe · Erase my data
text_body: Hi {{firstName}}, you're in. This message was encrypted end-to-end. Unsubscribe: {{unsubscribeUrl}}
